resolves: the parsing-sensitivity escalation recorded in rejudge/phase2_capability_anchor_selection_2026-07-19.json (strict winner Qwen2.5-7B 206/212 vs period-tolerant winner Llama-3.3-70B 209/212)
oracle_disposition: consult #23 (rejudge/phase2_codex_review_2026-07-21_consult23.md): for the completed r3 preflight and the canary anchor derived from it, the frozen strict rule governs; this is a parser-policy disposition, not a tie-break, because a tolerant parser would change the primary parser and winner before any tie exists

policy.historical_r3_primary_result: strict exact parser; Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-Turbo selected as the capability anchor at 206/212
policy.tolerant_rescore: the period-tolerant rescore (Llama-3.3-70B 209/212, all 57 INVALIDs being 'ANSWER: X.' trailing-period artifacts) is a post-hoc sensitivity analysis only and must be reported prominently alongside the primary result
policy.future_rule: if optional terminal punctuation is preferred going forward, preregister the tolerant pattern 'ANSWER: [AB]\.?' uniformly BEFORE a fresh capability-selection cycle; never retroactively promote Llama-3.3-70B from already-inspected outputs

binds_when_approved: the canary manifest's second full-document anchor derivation

owner_approval.status: PENDING - the canary is a next-phase decision; this policy binds nothing until the owner approves it

note: Append-only; no prior artifact is rewritten or deleted.
